titleStmt.title: The Chargé in China ( (Atcheson) ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Chargé in China ( Atcheson ) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 1706. Central News Agency September 12 reports passage by Central Executive Committee of resolution according to which National Government will convene National Congress within 1 year after conclusion of war in order to have constitution adopted and promulgated, National Congress to decide upon date when constitution is to come into effect.
